title: Ability to set a number column for capacity
excerpt: I would love to see the ability to add a “Number Column” to define the amount of available Capacity for a team member. Recently I saw a competing program have a “Directory” of team members that you could place there curr…

posts.author: jsteinmetz (John)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love to see the ability to add a “Number Column” to define the amount of available Capacity for a team member. Recently I saw a competing program have a “Directory” of team members that you could place there current capacity. The capacity manager would then change as needed.

Currently I have only found one way to change the available “Capacity” and that is to change to a custom weekly capacity on EVERY dashboard for workload. if you have multiple dashboards and 50+ resources this becomes exhausting.

2025-07-10_19-01-40293×679 26.9 KB

I propose we have a board and column selection here so we can have a “Capacity” board that every dashboard and workload widget could pull the appropriate associates capacity.
